label: Knowledge Search
description: Semantic search against the platform knowledge base (shared_knowledge + the calling user's private collection) via /api/chat/knowledge/search. Returns ranked chunks merged across both. Pair this with knowledge_ingest: the ingest endpoint writes to shared_knowledge / user_<id>_private, which this node reads from. rag_query targets a different Milvus collection set (code/docs/memories) — use that for code/doc lookups, this one for content the flow itself ingested.

settings.name: query
settings.label: Query
settings.placeholder: what does the latest research say about {{trigger.topic}}?

ai.shortDescription: Search the platform knowledge base (shared + private).
ai.whenToUse: When the flow has ingested content via knowledge_ingest and now wants to retrieve it for RAG. For pre-existing code/doc collections use rag_query instead.
ai.examplePrompt: search the knowledge base for chunks matching the user's topic
ai.promptHints: Reference results via {{steps.<id>.result.results}} (array of {id, content, score, source} per chunk). resultCount=0 means nothing matched — handle with a condition node if downstream logic needs context.

outputAssertions.name: knowledge_search_result_shape
outputAssertions.expression: result && typeof result.query === 'string' && typeof result.resultCount === 'number' && Array.isArray(result.results)
outputAssertions.errorMessage: knowledge_search result must be { query, resultCount, results[] }.
